items.name_en: 【 Side Trunk Mini Handbag】 M46815 46358 Monogram
items.name_cn:
【 Side Trunk Mini Handbag】 M46815 46358 Monogram
A highly stylized soft silhouette with sharp, strong edges fused with a box shape. The classic monogram pattern creates a unique look in the crowded bag market. It looks amazing worn and holds up well in any scene, offering a street-style vibe with a large capacity.
Size: 18*12.5*8cm

items.name_en: 【【Top Version Original Factory Leather Top Quality Original Set with Full Counter Packaging】Full Steel Hardware Black 】Top quality Goyard shopping bag SAINT LOUIS Large size made of GOYARDINE canvas, unlined, soft and lightweight, can be used on both sides, front is GOYARDINE canvas material, the other side is cotton and linen knit material. Two leather handles go from thin to thick, support multiple carrying methods. It comes with a removable inner bag, hung on one of the bag's handles for easy access.

Two leather handles go from thin to thick, support multiple carrying methods. It comes with a removable inner bag, hung on one of the bag's handles for easy access.
Size: 40X20X34(CM)

items.name_en: 【💯Five Grid New Sun God Blue】Lᴀᴅʏ Embroidered Diana Bag. The "Cʜʀɪsᴛɪᴀɴ Dɪᴏʀ" logo is stylish and feminine. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a large detachable double-sided embroidered shoulder strap, allowing you to choose your carrying style freely. Detachable double-sided embroidered wide strap, internal zip pocket and patch pocket. Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, easily paired with other embroidered straps.

items.name_en: 【ALMA BB Bag】M13078 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【ALMA BB Bag】M13078 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This Alma BB St bag exudes the joyful style of the collaboration series, cleverly revisiting the 1930s Art Deco design. The Monogram coated canvas renders the whimsical tones of Takashi Murakami, while the Toron handle, base, detachable shoulder strap, and key pouch incorporate classic calfskin elements.
Size: 23.5 x 17.5 x 11.5 cm

items.name_en: 【Authentic Chip Version】M46653
items.name_cn:
【Authentic Chip Version】M46653
This OnTheGo tote blends Giant Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, reinterpreting the spacious East West silhouette. A removable round coin pouch adds detail, while the Toron top handle and removable wide strap offer versatile carrying options. 25.0 x 13.0 x 10.0 cm (L x H x W)
